venue.name: The Oculus, University of Warwick
notes: Central Campus venues (including The Oculus) are signposted off Gibbet Hill Road.

travel.summary: Coventry is the most convenient station for most visitors and is on the West Coast Mainline.
details: Coventry is served by regular trains (7 days a week), including services from London Euston, Birmingham (New Street and International) and Leicester.
From Coventry station it’s easy to get a taxi or bus to campus.
Canley and Tile Hill stations are also served by trains from London, Milton Keynes, Birmingham, Coventry, Rugby and Northampton (note: neither has a taxi rank—book ahead if you don’t want to walk).
Leamington Spa is served by trains from Birmingham, Coventry, Oxford, Reading and London Marylebone; buses run to campus from close to the station.

travel.summary: Regular buses run from Coventry city centre, Coventry rail station and Leamington Spa.
details: From Coventry, routes 11 and 12 serve Warwick Conferences (stop: Rail Station Bridge SD on Warwick Road — ~1 minute walk from Coventry station).
From Leamington Spa, routes U1 and U2 serve Warwick Conferences (stop: Parish Church Stand B — ~7 minute walk from Leamington Spa station).

travel.summary: Taxis are readily available from Coventry station/city centre and from Leamington Spa.
details: If travelling via Canley or Tile Hill stations, book a taxi in advance (no taxi ranks).

travel.summary: Campus is well-signposted and easy to reach by road.
details: Use postcode CV4 7SH for sat nav.
Follow signs for Central Campus / The Oculus, via Gibbet Hill Road.

parking.summary: Parking is available across campus. If you’re staying on-site, you’ll receive a link to book parking, or you can register your vehicle when checking in.
parking.accessibility_note: Blue Badge parking is available in designated bays across campus (follow on-site signage).
